title: Imran Rashid - 339326
text:
Imran
 Rashid
 

 
 Solicitor
 
 

 
 339326
 
 


 








 

 

 
 Control of practice
 
 Date:
 9 March 2026
 
 
 

 


 

 

 

 

 Decision
 -
 Control of practice
 


 

 Outcome:
 Condition
 

 

 Outcome date:
 9 March 2026
 

 

 Published date:
 13 March 2026
 

 



 


 
Firm details


 

 Firm or organisation at time of matters giving rise to outcome

 

 

 Name:
 Eric Smith Law Limited
 

 

 Address(es):
 6th & 7th Floor,120 Bark Street, Bolton, BL1 2AX
 

 

 Firm ID:
 647825
 


 


 

 
Outcome details

 
This outcome was reached by SRA decision.



 
Decision details



Imran Rashid's practising certificate for 2025/2026 is subject to the following conditions:

Mr Rashid is not a manager or owner of an authorised body. 

Mr Rashid may not act as a compliance officer for legal practice (COLP) or compliance officer for finance and administration (COFA) for any authorised body.

Mr Rashid may not provide reserved or unreserved legal services on his own account under regulations 10.2(a) or (b) of the SRA Authorisation of Individuals Regulations.

Mr Rashid does not hold or receive client money, act as a signatory to any client or office account or have the power to authorise transfers from any client or office account.

In these conditions the terms are as defined in the SRA Glossary.

 
Reasons/basis



The above conditions are necessary in the public interest. They are reasonable and proportionate having regard to the purposes set out in regulation 7 of the SRA Authorisation of Individuals Regulations, and the regulatory objectives and principles governing regulatory activities as contained in section 28 of the Legal Services Act 2007.

Firm details


 

 Firm or organisation at date of publication and at time of matters giving rise to outcome
 

 

 Name:

 Address(es):

 Firm ID:
 647825
 


 


 

 
Outcome details

 
This outcome was reached by SRA decision.



 
Decision details



To intervene into Imran Rashid practising at Eric Smith Law Limited

 
Reasons/basis



Mr Rashid has failed to comply with rules (paragraph 1(1)(c)) of Schedule 1 – Part I to the Solicitors Act 1974).

It is necessary to intervene to protect the interests of clients or former clients and any beneficiaries of any trust of which Mr Rashid is or was a trustee (paragraph 1(1)(m) of Schedule 1 – Part I to the Solicitors Act 1974).


 
Intervening agents

 

 Sean Joyce
 of
 Stephensons,
 Wigan Investment Centre, Waterside Drive, Wigan, WN3 5BA
 has been appointed as the intervening agent.
 

 

 For enquiries please call
 0333 321 4406
 or email
